tagline: Orlando luxury real estate. Done differently.

identity.background: Licensed broker specializing in Orlando luxury real estate. Local market expert with deep knowledge of Windermere, Dr. Phillips, Baldwin Park, Lake Nona, and Winter Park neighborhoods.
identity.story: Bent brings a personal, no-pressure approach to luxury real estate in Central Florida. He believes the best deals come from deep market knowledge and genuine relationships — not high-pressure sales tactics.
identity.differentiator: Hands-on broker who knows every street in Orlando's luxury corridors. Not a team of juniors behind a fancy name — when you work with MAXIM, you work with Bent.

voice.tone: Knowledgeable and approachable. Conversational authority without being salesy. Feels like getting advice from a trusted friend who happens to know everything about Orlando real estate.
voice.language: English. Professional but warm. No corporate jargon. No pressure tactics.
personality: Local expert — references specific neighborhoods, streets, and market dynamics
Data-driven — backs opinions with market stats and trends
Approachable — feels like a conversation, not a pitch
Genuine — shares real market insights even when they're not 'exciting'
Community-oriented — loves Orlando, knows the lifestyle, not just the listings
signaturePhrases: Know your market before it knows you.
The right home at the right time.

primary: High-net-worth buyers looking at $500K-$3M+ homes in Orlando metro
Relocating professionals and families (especially from NYC, NJ, CA, IL)
Orlando luxury homeowners considering selling or upgrading
Real estate investors looking at Central Florida market opportunities
secondary: Other agents and brokers in the Orlando market (networking/referrals)
Orlando business owners who need commercial space
Snowbirds looking for seasonal Orlando properties

painPoints: Agents who don't know the local market
Generic MLS listings with no insight
Not knowing what's happening in their neighborhood

market_intel.description: Daily Orlando real estate market news, trends, data, interest rates, and neighborhood updates
market_intel.goal: Position Bent as THE Orlando market authority. First person people think of for luxury real estate intel.
bestPractices: Lead with the insight, not the source
Always tie national news to Orlando-specific impact
Include specific neighborhoods or zip codes when relevant
Make business owners and homeowners feel informed, not sold to

neighborhood_spotlight.description: Deep dives into Orlando's luxury neighborhoods — what's happening, what's selling, lifestyle insights
neighborhood_spotlight.goal: Show hyperlocal expertise that no national brand can match.
bestPractices: Reference specific streets, developments, or landmarks
Mix market data with lifestyle commentary
Photos/videos of the actual neighborhood, not stock imagery

listing_showcase.description: Featured properties — active listings, recent sales, market comparisons
listing_showcase.goal: Showcase inventory and sold properties to demonstrate market activity.
bestPractices: Lead with what makes the property special, not the spec sheet
Include price context — what similar homes are doing
Never sound like a listing sheet — sound like a friend telling you about a great house

market_opinion.description: Bent's take on market conditions, rate changes, buyer/seller strategies, investment opportunities
market_opinion.goal: Build thought leadership through strong, well-informed positions.
bestPractices: Have a clear opinion — don't hedge everything
Back it up with data or local experience
Address what buyers OR sellers should actually do, not just what's happening

community.description: Orlando lifestyle, events, restaurants, things to do — the life behind the listings
community.goal: Show that Bent lives and breathes Orlando. Humanize the brand.
bestPractices: Tie lifestyle content back to neighborhoods naturally
Keep it genuine — share what you actually like

linkedin.strategy: Primary channel. Daily market intel + thought leadership. Position as Orlando's most informed luxury broker.

posting.style: Professional but conversational. Short paragraphs. Data-backed. Lead with insight.

rules: No hashtag soup — max 3 relevant hashtags
Every post must provide standalone value — no 'stay tuned' or 'link in bio'
NO hard sells — let expertise do the selling
Reference Orlando/Central Florida in most posts for local SEO

instagram.strategy: Future consideration — property showcases and neighborhood tours.

visual.aesthetic: Clean, premium, understated luxury. White space. High-quality property photography.
visual.imageStyle: AI-generated real estate visuals using Grok Imagine — Orlando skyline, luxury interiors, neighborhood aerials. Cinematic, warm tone.
